layers.name: API & Orchestration
layers.description: FastAPI entry points and high-level pipeline orchestration for campaign generation and scraping.

layers.name: Agentic Services
layers.description: Specialized AI agents responsible for specific domains like brand intelligence, visual analysis, and web search.

layers.name: Data Models & State
layers.description: Pydantic models and state management structures for consistent data flow across the pipeline.

layers.name: Extractors & Utilities
layers.description: Specialized extractors for colors, fonts, and content, along with shared helper functions and configuration.

layers.name: Prompts & Guards
layers.description: AI prompt templates, enhancers, and safety guards that drive the generative capabilities of the system.
